name: HBV_polymerase_rt_domain
description: HBV reverse-transcriptase (RT) domain of the polymerase ORF (aa 349-692 of P; nt ~130-1160 on the genome with wrap). Contains the YMDD catalytic motif and is the target of nucleos(t)ide analogue therapy (lamivudine, entecavir, tenofovir). Drug-resistance mutations are clinically scored at positions rtM204V/I, rtL180M, rtN236T, rtA181T/V. The RT domain overlaps the S gene in a different frame, so RT mutations frequently alter HBsAg sequence — read mapping must disambiguate between the two reading frames when calling resistance.
